document.title: Material Safety Data Sheet(MSDS) - Polyester Pressure Sensitive Adhesive Tape
document.documentDate: Issuing date 2008. 06. 05; date of last revision 2017. 09. 13

sourceSummary.oneLine: MSDS for DAEHYUNST Polyester Pressure Sensitive Adhesive Tape, product code ST-9108.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports material safety, biocompatibility, handling, transport, disposal, and regulatory information for the adhesive tape used in DHF documentation.
keyPoints: Product is identified as Polyester Pressure Sensitive Adhesive Tape with manufacture's product code ST-9108.
Manufacturer/supplier is DAEHYUNST Co.,Ltd. in Hwaseong-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea.
Composition excluding release film includes polyethylene terephthalate, acrylic copolymer, and trimethylated silica treated dimethyl siloxane.
Hazard and label elements are mostly stated as None, with NFPA health 1, fire 1, reactivity 0.
Transport section states the product is not restricted for transportation.
Regulatory section lists domestic and other country requirements, including America group information and EU group information, but many entries are Not provided.

entities.name: Trimethylated silica treated dimethyl siloxane
entities.evidence: Ingredient Trimethylated silica treated dimethyl siloxane

entities.name: Waste Management Law
entities.evidence: Product should be disposed of in accordance with Waste Mangement Law

evidence.claim: The document is a Material Safety Data Sheet for Polyester Pressure Sensitive Adhesive Tape.
evidence.evidenceText: Material Safety Data Sheet(MSDS) ... Polyester Pressure Sensitive Adhesive Tape

evidence.claim: The manufacturer or supplier is DAEHYUNST Co.,Ltd.
The manufacturer address is 1337-11, Beodeul-ro, Paltan-myeon, Hwaseong-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Address ... 1337-11, Beodeul-ro, Paltan-myeon, Hwaseong-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea

evidence.claim: The manufacturer's product code is ST-9108.
The composition excluding release film lists polyethylene terephthalate at 30~35 percent by weight.
The composition lists acrylic copolymer at 35~45 percent by weight.
The composition lists trimethylated silica treated dimethyl siloxane.
evidence.evidenceText: Ingredient Trimethylated silica treated dimethyl siloxane

evidence.claim: NFPA values are health 1, fire 1, and reactivity 0.
Recommended extinguishing media include water, carbon dioxide, foam, and dry chemical.
evidence.evidenceText: Water, Carbon dioxide, Foam, Dry chemical

evidence.claim: Hazardous combustion products include carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, and formaldehyde.
The product is described as a white roll of tape.
evidence.evidenceText: 9. Physical and chemical properties White roll of tape

evidence.claim: Chemical stability is stated as stable.
The MSDS says to avoid temperature above 200℃ without adequate ventilation.
evidence.evidenceText: Avoid temperature above 200℃ without adequate ventilation

evidence.claim: Direct contact may cause severe skin irritation and moderate eye irritation.
evidence.evidenceText: Direct contantact may cause severe irritation. May cause moderate irritation.

evidence.claim: Product disposal should be in accordance with Waste Management Law.
evidence.evidenceText: Product should be disposed of in accordance with Waste Mangement Law

evidence.claim: The product is not restricted for transportation.

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal is FDA in source metadata, but FDA is not present in the extracted source text; authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous.
OCR quality is low, with misspellings such as Harzard, Transfort, Contry, attetion, and eill.
No standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
Several regulatory entries are marked Not provided or None, limiting regulatory detail.
